zh.lifeSummary: 當Teresa Pires Portel於1210年出生在葡萄牙埃沃拉波特爾時，她的父親Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal40歲，母親Froile Rodrigues de Pereira-4歲。她和Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1291年在葡萄牙享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Teresa Pires Portel于1210年出生在葡萄牙埃沃拉波特爾时，她的父亲Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal40岁，母亲Froile Rodrigues de Pereira-4岁。她和Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1291年在葡萄牙享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pires
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Antonio, Luis, Sergio, Fernando, Alberto, Carlos, Domingos, Mario, Adelino, Albino, Armindo.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Vasco, Ilidio, Amadeu, Duarte, Lourenco.
Portuguese, Galician, and western Spanish: patronymic from the personal name Pedro, an equivalent of Peter . Compare Portuguese Peres , Spanish Perez .
English: possibly a variant of   Pierce  .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: Portel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: habitational name from Bordal near Hanover-Münden or a wooded area of the same name near Göttingen (both in Lower Saxony).
North German: metonymic occupational name for a tailor, derived from Middle Low German borde ‘trimming, hem, belt’.
Flemish (Van Bortel): probably a topographic name from bork(t) ‘birch(es)’ + lo ‘(open space in a) wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Teresa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Theresa .  In the English-speaking world the name is often chosen in this spelling by Roman Catholics, with particular reference to the Spanish saint, Teresa of Ávila (  Teresa Cepeda de Ahumada ,  1515–82 ).

variants.name: Theresa
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

variants.name: Teresia
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

en.lifeSummary: When Teresa Pires Portel was born in 1210, in Portel, Évora, Portugal, her father, Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal, was 40 and her mother, Froile Rodrigues de Pereira, was -4. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua. She died in 1291, in Portugal, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Teresa Pires Portel est née en 1210, à Portel, Évora, Portugal, son père, Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Froile Rodrigues de Pereira, avait -4 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua. Elle est décédée en 1291, à Portugal, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Teresa Pires Portel 1210 in Portel, Évora, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal 40 und ihre Mutter Froile Rodrigues de Pereira -4. Sie hatte mit Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1291 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Teresa Pires Portel è nata il nel 1210 nel Portel, Évora, Portogallo, sua padre, Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Froile Rodrigues de Pereira, aveva -4 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua. Morì nel 1291, nel Portogallo, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Teresa Pires Portelが1210年にポルトガルeボラポルテルで生まれた時，父Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugalは40歳，母Froile Rodrigues de Pereiraは-4歳であった。彼女はVasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábuaとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1291年にポルトガルで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Teresa Pires Portel(이)가 1210년 포르투갈 e보라 포텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Froile Rodrigues de Pereira(은)는 -4세였다. 그녀는 Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1291년 포르투갈에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Teresa Pires Portel nasceu em 1210, em Portel, Évora, Portugal, seu pai, Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Froile Rodrigues de Pereira, tinha -4 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua. Ela faleceu em 1291, em Portugal, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Teresa Pires Portel родилась в 1210 г. в местности портел, eвора, Португалия, её отцу по имени Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Froile Rodrigues de Pereira, -4. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua. Она умерла в 1291 г. в местности Португалия в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Teresa Pires Portel nació en 1210, en Portel, Évora, Portugal, su papá, Pedro Fernandez Porcalho de Freire e Portugal, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Froile Rodrigues de Pereira, tenía -4 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Vasco Lourenço da Cunha, 2nd Lord of the Morgado de Tábua. Murió en 1291, en Portugal, a la edad de 81 años.
